input.command:
cat > /tmp/analyze_shadow.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

echo "==== Password Hash Algorithm Report ===="
echo ""

while IFS=: read -r username password rest; do
    # Skip empty lines
    [ -z "$username" ] && continue
    
    if [ "$password" = "*" ] || [ "$password" = "!" ] || [ -z "$password" ]; then
        hash_type="LOCKED/DISABLED (no login)"
    elif [ "$password" = "NP" ]; then
        hash_type="NP (no password set)"
    else
        # Extract the hash algorithm identifier from the password field
        # Format: $id$rounds=N$salt$hash or $id$salt$hash
        prefix=$(echo "$password" | cut -d'$' -f2)
        
        case "$prefix" in
            1) hash_type="MD5 (crypt - WEAK)" ;;
            2a|2b|2x|2y) hash_type="Bcrypt (MODERATE)" ;;
            5) hash_type="SHA-256 (crypt - GOOD)" ;;
            6) hash_type="SHA-512 (crypt - STRONG)" ;;
            *) hash_type="UNKNOWN or corrupted" ;;
        esac
    fi
    
    printf "%-20s | %s\n" "$username" "$hash_type"
done < /etc/shadow

echo ""
echo "==== Summary ===="
echo "Hash Algorithm IDs:"
echo "  \$1 = MD5           (WEAK - deprecated)"
echo "  \$2a/2b/2x/2y = Bcrypt  (MODERATE)"
echo "  \$5 = SHA-256       (GOOD)"
echo "  \$6 = SHA-512       (STRONG - recommended)"
echo "  * or ! = Account locked/disabled"
EOF

chmod +x /tmp/analyze_shadow.sh
/tmp/analyze_shadow.sh
